overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rainy neon-lit city at night. The player waits at an intersection behind a white sports car before accelerating through the urban streets, passing other vehicles and pedestrians under the glow of holographic advertisements and street lights.

agents.ego_description: stopped at intersection behind a white sports car, observing traffic and waiting for the signal to proceed

notable_agents.action: white sports car with blue racing stripes stopped at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: sleek white sports car with blue stripes visible through the rainy windshield
futuristic vehicle dashboard with green illuminated displays and steering wheel
bright cyan and red neon signs on distant buildings glowing through the rain
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt
boxy yellow delivery van stopped ahead at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from inside a truck cabin at a rainy night intersection in a cyberpunk city. A white sports car waits directly ahead while neon signs glow through the rain-streaked windshield. The dashboard displays green illuminated controls as the vehicle remains stationary.

events.description: driver pans camera left to check for oncoming cross traffic
vehicle begins to roll forward as the intersection clears

agents.ego_description: checking left and right for cross traffic while waiting at the intersection, then beginning to accelerate

notable_agents.action: blue compact car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: small blue hatchback driving through the crosswalk from the left

segments.scene_description: While stopped at the intersection, the driver looks left to check for traffic, revealing a blue compact car passing through. Pedestrians are visible on the distant sidewalks. The yellow van ahead moves closer as the vehicle begins to inch forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial with neon signage

events.description: accelerating rapidly through the intersection crosswalk
passing from the open intersection into the urban street canyon with overpasses ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection and onto the main road, navigating between other vehicles while speed increases

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead with support columns
large illuminated advertisement screen on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the intersection, leaving the white sports car behind. The speedometer climbs as the car enters a multi-lane urban street lined with neon billboards. A red sports car overtakes on the left while an overpass looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highways and dense neon advertising

events.description: passing under a concrete overpass with reduced ambient lighting
navigating through moderate traffic with vehicles changing lanes ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through the city streets, passing under overpasses and alongside illuminated buildings with occasional braking for traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking along the sidewalk in the rain

entered.detail: multi-level highway structure crossing above the street with concrete supports
floating holographic billboards and building-mounted digital displays

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of the cyberpunk city, the vehicle passes under elevated highways and concrete overpasses. Holographic advertisements glow on building facades while pedestrians with umbrellas walk the wet sidewalks. The car maintains high speed, weaving through moderate traffic as neon lights reflect off the rain-slicked road surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a vehicle, transitioning from a stationary wait at a rainy intersection to a high-speed drive through a neon-lit urban corridor. It begins within a truck cabin, where green illuminated dashboard controls glow and rain streaks the windshield while a white sports car waits directly ahead. As the driver glances left to check for traffic, a blue compact car passes by and pedestrians appear on distant sidewalks before the vehicle begins to inch forward. The scene then shifts into rapid motion as the truck accelerates through the intersection, leaving the white sports car behind and causing the speedometer to climb. Finally, the camera surges forward into a multi-lane street lined with glowing billboards, passing a red sports car on the left as a massive overpass looms in the distance.

The shot follows a high-speed drive through a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis, moving from the shadowed depths of urban infrastructure into the vibrant glow of the city center. It begins by weaving through moderate traffic beneath the heavy concrete of elevated highways and overpasses, where the road surface shimmers with neon reflections. As the vehicle accelerates, the camera glides past wet sidewalks crowded with pedestrians holding umbrellas, while the surrounding architecture becomes dominated by towering building facades. The scene then opens up to reveal massive holographic advertisements that cast vivid light across the rain-slicked streets before the car continues its rapid trajectory deeper into the neon-lit heart of the city.
